texto: I came to Southbury because I wanted to live a more simple life. When I was a child, I saw lots of movies about happy people living in Connecticut. And ever since then, that was where I wanted to live. I thought it would be like the movies. And it really is. It's exactly what I hoped it would be.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Polly Bergen: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “I came to Southbury because I wanted to live a more simple life. When I was a child, I saw lots o…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, happy, simple pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de happy e simple.
